_comment: Battle AI phase 1 (#584) showcase: three unit-leader decisions issued as real queue orders, with no direct target_enemy write. (1) The AI spearmen (anti_cavalry) on the left forms the anti-cavalry square on its own as player cavalry closes -- no player key press arms it, unlike the player-driven anti-cav-square.json demo. (2) The AI infantry on the right advances and attacks the player infantry it's assigned (the advance/attack fallback, now a real ATTACK order) while a second player unit is walked onto its flank; the AI leader reacts by re-facing onto the flanker. Deterministic (scenario + seed + scripted input).
